headline: Generac Investor Day: New segments, data center push, and 2028 targets with 2026 guidance intact
summary: Generac (NYSE:GNRC) used its 2026 Investor Day to outline a new organizational structure, highlight what executives called a “generational opportunity” tied to grid constraints and data center growth, and provide an updated three-year financial framework through 2028 while reiterating 2026 guidance.
